posts.title: [Freelance Contract] Finalize standard contract template - Michael Reed
posts.body: Attaching the standard contract template for Michael's contract. It includes a short-to-long-term conversion clause, so please review and reply…

posts.title: Outsourced contract translation review complete
posts.body: Finished reviewing the Japanese contract translation. Legal review is done, only both signatures remain. Sharing the final contract PDF…

posts.title: Negotiating trade show booth construction contract terms
posts.body: …Negotiating contract terms with the booth construction vendor. The amount and schedule clauses need adjustment. Please review the contract draft…

feed.title: Process Mgmt Weekly
body: Sharing this week's Line A process management.

sub: From bottleneck re-layout. Jig improvement applied next week.
Fixed 2 main causes. Under follow-up observation.
Set inspection cycles. Target 20% less downtime.

posts.title: [Process] Review cutting Line A tact time
posts.body: Reviewed a process improvement to cut tact time by re-laying out the bottleneck process. Measured per-process times, redefined the standard process; jigs can cut it further...

posts.title: Initial production process defect analysis
posts.body: Classified initial-production defects by process and analyzed causes. Applied fixes to 2 key processes, under observation...

posts.title: Handling process delay from equipment stop
posts.body: A stop delayed downstream processes, so we revised the preventive maintenance cycle to prioritize key equipment uptime...

posts.title: Standardize incoming inspection process
posts.body: Standardized the incoming inspection process for new parts and unified the pass criteria via the inspection sheet...

posts.title: SOP process update notice
posts.body: Updated the SOP for the changed process. To be applied after operator training...

comments.text: Please re-measure the standard process time and reflect it in the SOP.
This process defect seems caused by jig wear. Please consider replacement.
We should raise the equipment-check process to weekly.
Attached the incoming inspection process criteria. Apply from next intake.
Process improvement is working 👍 Let's roll it out to other lines.

chats.text: Just shared the Line A process data! Please check utilization
Updated the defect tracking sheet for this process. Please review
Finished the equipment-check process. Preventive maintenance next week
Once the incoming inspection criteria are set, I'll share them!
Let's schedule the process improvement rollout, minimizing line stops!
